**joinkey-review is done.** Key finding: codex1's `InterestId(0)` worry was a red herring, but there's a real bug — `wire_id_hint` hashes the pre-compile shape while the real wire subscription id hashes the post-compile shape, and author-partitioning + lattice-merge in the planner mean any multi-author follow feed (i.e. almost all of them) will silently fail to correlate. Recommended fix: join on `SubShape.originating_interests` (real `InterestId`s) instead of a shape hash, or ship the current approach explicitly flagged as lossy.

Posted the finding to `#x-ray` and cross-notified the relay-seam-design agent since it affects what identity their snapshot producer should expose. Still waiting on scope-review's report and relay-seam-design's implementation.
